extract: The Parfum Palace (Japanese: パルファム宮殿(きゅうでん) Parfum Palace) is a palace in Kalos located at the north end of Route 6. The palace was built by the king of Kalos shortly after a war with the neighboring regions 300 years ago, which is not to be confused with the 3,000-year-old Kalos war. In modern times, the palace has been re-purposed as a public museum, which charges an entrance fee of $1,000.
